free_text: Channel effects in the energy dependence of the number
of prompt neutrons and the kinetic energy of fragments
in the fission of U235 and U233 by neutrons
Issue 4. Tables and graphs are given
Disks of 30 mm diameter, 3 mm thickness.
Free text was corrected to be human-readable.
Update for current rules and dictionaries.
